name: product
description: Product orchestration agent that routes catalog discovery, catalog administration, merchandising, and pricing tasks to focused product specialists.

skills.name: Product Catalog Discovery
skills.description: Route product search, variant lookup, dashboard, stock-alert, and analytics questions to the product discovery specialist.
examples: Find barcode scanners in the catalog.
Show products related to wireless keyboard.
Look up products by name, SKU, or catalog terms.

skills.name: Product Catalog Administration
skills.description: Route product creation, product updates, bulk catalog seeding, and catalog export work to the product admin specialist.
examples: Create the first products for this business.
Seed the initial catalog during onboarding.
Bulk update POS settings for selected products.

skills.name: Product Merchandising
skills.description: Route featured/quick-sale toggles, variant visibility, media, and product attribute maintenance to the merchandising specialist.

skills.name: Product Pricing
skills.description: Route pricing rules, price-history, price-trend, and purchase-price workflows to the pricing specialist.
examples: Inspect recent price changes for a product.
Show the pricing rules for a product.
